prompt:
Rephrase this question 5 different ways. Same meaning, different wording.
Original: Americans work less than people in which other rich countries?
Give exactly 5 rephrasings, one per line, numbered 1-
response:
1. In which other wealthy countries do people work more than Americans?  
2. Compared to Americans, citizens of which other affluent nations work longer hours?  
3. Which other prosperous countries have people who work more than Americans do?  
4. Americans work fewer hours than people in which other developed countries?  
5. In what other high-income countries do people put in more work hours than Americans?
